biography_short: Gobernador moro mencionado en relación con las campañas en el norte y con la presencia de rehénes; las fuentes recogen su papel en la política de control y castigo.

visual_profile.clothing: gubernatorial garb: lamellar or distinctive cloak; accoutrements of Muslim provincial governor
visual_profile.style_notes: portrayal should reflect a provincial governor with martial command rather than courtly splendor.

must_keep: Appears in sources as governor/actor linked to northern operations and to an episode involving Pelayo as part of a group of captives/rehenes
must_avoid: Attributing specific personal motives or domestic arrangements beyond what the sources state

emotional_state.trigger_summary: Agent of central authority; involvement in power plays and garrison actions.

arc_state.external_goal: maintain control and authority on the northern frontier
arc_state.internal_need: preserve favor with central powers in Córdoba
arc_state.contradiction: local initiatives vs. distant caliphal oversight
arc_state.change_vector: engagement in frontier politics, occasional recall to central authorities
